title: Vroom Vroom Lyrics 10 Endrathukulla Song Lyrics
stanzas:
10 Endrathukulla Vroom Vroom Song Lyrics
Lyrics: Madhan Karky
Music : D Imman
Singer: Santosh Hariharan

Pera kaettaa bejaaru panra
meiyya sollu yaaruda nee.
Fees-u vaangi confuse-u panra
meiyya sollu yaaruda nee.

Naan paanja bullet-u thaan
aabaththae chicklet-u thaan.
car ottum fight jettu naan
ponnunga magnet-u naan.

Enakunnu illa goondu
un nenjula yaenda gaandu.
unakenna venum vendu
ennoda peru Bond-u.

Pera kaettaa bejaaru panra
meiyya sollu yaaruda nee.
Fees-u vaangi confuse-u panra
meiyya sollu yaaruda nee.

en kannil achcham illa
en pola uchcham illa.
oorukku chella pulla
edhirikku naanthaan tholla.

enakkunnu illa veli
naan aadura varaikum jaali.
adichaa ellaam gaali
ennoda peru kholi.

Pera kaettaa bejaaru panra
meiyya sollu yaaruda nee.
Fees-u vaangi confuse-u panra
meiyya sollu yaaruda nee.

Yaen ooru paramakudi
naan yaaru kandupudi.
moththa viththa aththupadi
yaenkitta kaththukadi.

padippukku pogala tuition
aana nadippula naan oru ocean.
pudhumaiga thaan en fashion
ennoda peru haasan

HAASAN KAMAL HAASAN
nee nallavana kettavana
rendu serndhadhu thaan naan
a hero and a villain.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Vroom Vroom conveys a sense of excitement and adventure, reflecting the carefree spirit of youth.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In 10 Endrathukulla, the song accompanies scenes of thrilling escapades, enhancing the adventurous theme of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Santhosh Hariharan and composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

Vroom Vroom was released on September 18, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Vroom Vroom from 10 Endrathukulla encapsulates the thrill of adventure and youthful exuberance. With its upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics, it evokes feelings of excitement and energy. The vibrant composition by D Imman, paired with Santhosh Hariharan's lively vocals, makes it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. This track not only enhances the film's adventurous spirit but also resonates with listeners looking for an energetic boost.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vroom Vroom from 10 Endrathukulla is an electrifying track that perfectly captures the thrill of adventure. With Santhosh Hariharan's dynamic vocals and D Imman's vibrant composition, this song is sure to get your adrenaline pumping. Dive into the energetic beats and let the music take you on a ride!
stanzaMeanings: When you ask for a name, who are you trying to impress? When you take fees, who are you confusing?
I am a bullet, and I am a chicklet. In a car fight, I am the magnet for girls.
I have no connection with you, what is in your heart? What do you want? My name is Bond.
When you ask for a name, who are you trying to impress? When you take fees, who are you confusing?
I have no fear in my eyes, I am not loud like others. I am the one who stands against the boys in the town.
I have no connection with the outside world until I reach my destination. If I hit, everything will be a mess; my name is Kholi.
When you ask for a name, who are you trying to impress? When you take fees, who are you confusing?
Why am I in Paramakudi? Who am I to find? All the money is with me, so don't mess with me.
I don't go for studies; I am an ocean in tuition. My fashion is unique; my name is Haasan.
HAASAN KAMAL HAASAN, whether good or bad, I am both a hero and a villain.
